items.fullName: Endovascular Thrombectomy for Large-Core Ischaemic Stroke up to 24 h — Systematic Review and IPD Meta-analysis with Central Imaging Adjudication
items.practiceImpact: Consolidates EVT benefit across large-core strata to 24 h, except very extensive cores (≥150 mL) beyond 6 h where evidence remains limited.

items.fullName: Adjunctive Intra-Arterial Alteplase After Successful Thrombectomy for Acute Ischemic Stroke
items.practiceImpact: IA alteplase after successful EVT improved excellent outcomes and reperfusion — but a higher mortality signal warrants caution before adoption.

items.fullName: Direct versus Conventional Transfer to Angiography Suite in Patients with Severe Acute Stroke Treated with Thrombectomy (France)
items.practiceImpact: Bypassing pre-EVT imaging increased sICH without benefit and was halted early — cautions against direct-to-angio in suspected LVO.

items.fullName: Endovascular Treatment for Medium or Distal Vessel Occlusion Stroke — 12-Month Outcomes
items.topicLabel: EVT for medium / distal vessel occlusion

design.population: Median 77; Median 6; ≤6 h, or 6-24 h with salvageable tissue

items.practiceImpact: No long-term benefit of EVT in mild-to-moderate medium/distal vessel occlusion — routine thrombectomy not supported in this population.

items.fullName: Severity-Stratified Hyponatremia Is Associated with Increased Mortality and Complications in Nontraumatic Intracerebral Hemorrhage
items.practiceImpact: Serum sodium is a readily-available risk-stratification marker in acute ICH; supports vigilant Na monitoring (causality not established).
items.observationalCaveat: Observational study — confounding limits causal inference; interpret with caution.

items.practiceImpact: Asundexian on top of antiplatelets cut ischaemic stroke ~26% without more major bleeding — could reshape noncardioembolic prevention.

items.fullName: Catheter Ablation and Oral Anticoagulation for Secondary Stroke Prevention in Atrial Fibrillation
items.practiceImpact: Adding ablation to anticoagulation did not reduce recurrent events in post-stroke AF (underpowered) — does not support routine ablation for secondary prevention.

items.fullName: Increased Risk of Suicide after Stroke: A Population-Based Matched Cohort Study

result.effect: Higher in stroke survivors: 11.1 vs 3.2 per 10,000 person-years

items.practiceImpact: Supports long-term (beyond 1 year) suicidality screening in survivors — especially younger and lower-income patients.
items.observationalCaveat: Observational study — confounding limits causal inference; interpret with caution.

items.fullName: Ticagrelor with Aspirin Dual Antiplatelet Therapy combined with Intravenous Thrombolysis in Patients with Ischaemic Stroke in China
items.topicLabel: DAPT for minor stroke / high-risk TIA
items.practiceImpact: Early oral DAPT within 6 h as an adjunct to thrombolysis improved excellent outcomes in moderate stroke — a strategy long considered contraindicated; small sICH risk not excluded.

items.fullName: Real-World Efficacy and Safety of Tenecteplase versus Alteplase in Acute Ischemic Stroke: A Propensity Score-Matched Analysis
items.practiceImpact: Adds real-world support for tenecteplase as a practical alteplase alternative — consistent with trial-level non-inferiority.
items.observationalCaveat: Observational study — confounding limits causal inference; interpret with caution.

items.fullName: Three Low-Dose Antihypertensive Agents in a Single Pill after Intracerebral Hemorrhage
items.practiceImpact: A simplified low-dose triple pill after ICH lowers recurrent stroke and CV events — supports intensive, simplified BP-lowering.

items.fullName: IPD Meta-analysis of Anticoagulation Timing after Ischaemic Stroke with AF
items.practiceImpact: Pooled IPD shows early DOAC (≤4 d) reduces 30-d composite — supports early initiation.
